extension.description: Automatically track movies and TV shows you watch in Kodi on your WeTrakr profile. Marks content as watched, syncs your viewing activity in real-time.
extension.news:
v1.1.4 - Ship episode payload even when the show isn't in Kodi's library
v1.1.3 - Non-blocking notifications - Per-event toggles for scrobbling and rating
v1.1.2 - Render rating stars as PNG images - Drop unicode dependency
